title: Utility Meter
description: The Utility Meter function block has been replaced by new meter blocks in Loxone Config 13.1.

inputs.description: For meters with pulse output connected to digital inputs.
For meters with pulse output connected to digital inputs used as frequency counter. Number of pulses since last reading.
For meters that send consumption directly as analog value. Parameter (Abs) defines wether the value is added or used as an absolute value.
If this input for the current power or flow is used alone, the consumption is also calculated from it. Otherwise used only for output (Pf) and user interface.
Pulse: Consumption values on outputs are reset. On: Block is locked.

outputs.description: Current power/flow calculated using parameter (At) when using (Cp) or (Cf). Value taken directly from input (Pf) if connected.
Current power/flow calculated from one pulse to the next. Only available if input (Cp) is used.
Intelligent API based connector. API Commands

parameters.description: Used to calculate the consumption using (Cp) or (Cf).
Handling of consumption input (C): 0 = Each new value is added incrementally to the total consumption. 1 = Value is used absolute and equals the reading of the meter.
